pity in 90 pulls in this game right?
want to grind asap for Arachne

There is soft pity and hard pity
Soft pity is every 30 pulls, in which you are guaranteed and SSR
Hard pity is at 90, where you are guaranteed the RATE UP SSR
and if i get a ssr between 30 and 40 for example
it countinues to be at 60 and 90?
If you get an SSR at 15 pulls, then next soft pity should be 45
Pity is always 30 pulls later from my understanding
the count allways resets at 30 when i get a ssr that is not the featured ope
And if you get an SSR at 5, then another at 10, then you are guaranteed the rate up SSR at 40 or before then if you get lucky
oooh, so the 3rd ssr has allways to be the featured one?

ok here goes:

W1- this one is a little homebrew… Arachne main carry, Daff is on poison duty, Blesser will basically have a big attack where if you don’t shield it you will take really bad damage, you’re gonna loneseed dupe Naut 3 cost and then pop them all+ exalt on his big hit to hopefully survive it
W2- Bluewill, straightforward
W3- Boss dies to counter, so just spam Caecus 2 cost, posse is used to bring Caecus 2 cost back to your hand but if you don’t have it encounter in pure white might work instead
W4- borrow wave, just throw whatevers left with a +12 Mouchette or Pollux and win
W5- this one is the most sketch so **do this one first** and divert resources into it if you can’t clear

Do **A3 First, A2 if you can’t do it**

also grab the keyflare wheels from the pearl shop, make a big difference

I… may or may not be waiting for the buffs on monday to do Tide, but if you just want a general framework then:
W1 throw Kath at it, Sanga if you don’t have Kath; regardless of the team they will appreciate Castor or any big shielder like Salv on the team
W2 Anything that has good AoE will work here and enemies also do double hits… this could potentially be the Arachne or even poison wave since Arachne could potentially snipe the lady with a well played burst
W3 quite literally dies to the smallest amount of counter, any counter unit you have can ridicule this wave
W4 probably the hardest one this time around, would consider whale support here
W5 need to spam posse to weaken the boss, so slam as much skey as possible to posse every turn

for GDoll… she’s a poison unit and you just kinda… don’t have a decent poison team, the poison wave is also a counter wave this rotation so that doesn’t help them

for Horla you’re only using one Ultra wave this rotation and its kinda difficult to fit her in there… ironically you might even bench daff for Horla xd; hell, maybe Ultrawill might be better on W2 but idk
